steps.content: frontend-dev needs the API schema from backend-dev

send_message(
  to: "backend-dev",
  content: "Please share the API schema for user endpoints",
  type: "message"
)
steps.annotation: Message written to backend-dev's inbox file

steps.content:
[Inbox] Message delivered to .inbox/backend-dev.jsonl
Message types: message | task_update | shutdown_request | plan_approval | broadcast
steps.annotation: Async JSONL inboxes decouple sender from receiver
Delivery is async -- backend-dev reads on next cycle

steps.content:
[backend-dev] Checking inbox... 1 new message
From: frontend-dev
Content: "Please share the API schema for user endpoints"
steps.annotation: backend-dev reads inbox on its next iteration

steps.content:
[backend-dev -> frontend-dev] Reply delivered to .inbox/frontend-dev.jsonl
Content: "API schema: GET /users, POST /users, GET /users/:id"
steps.annotation: Reply flows through the same inbox mechanism

steps.content: backend-dev has shared the API schema with frontend-dev. Communication is flowing through file-based inboxes.
steps.annotation: 5 message types enable rich coordination without shared memory
